title: Requirement Schema
description: Structured requirement extracted from RFQ, product specification, architecture document, feature matrix, firmware specification, validation plan, or customer requirement.

requirement_id.description: Unique requirement identifier, such as BIOS-REQ-001.

source_document.description: Original source document, such as RFQ, ARD, FM, CSTL, BIOS Spec, NUDD, UX Spec, validation plan, or customer requirement.

source_section.description: Section or paragraph in the source document.

owner_team.description: Primary owner team responsible for execution.

upstream_dependencies.description: Inputs required from upstream teams before implementation can complete.

downstream_dependencies.description: Teams or deliverables impacted by this requirement.

acceptance_criteria.description: How the requirement will be verified or accepted.

risk_if_late.description: Potential impact if this requirement is late or incomplete.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before using this requirement in execution tracking.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence score for extraction or owner routing.
